Business: Global Surfaces Limited engages in the mining, production, and export of natural stones and engineered quartz in the United States, the United Arab Emirates, and India. It offers natural stones, such as granites, marbles, soft quartzites, and phylites and soapstones; and engineered quartz products, including stratum, prismatic, quartzites, kalmasa,…

  Current: 120.50  (-0.21% vs prior)

  Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

  Current: 15.67  (-5.03% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
